SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

COURT CONVENES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, VINCENT KIRCHER, IS AWARDED A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $800 AGAINST DEFENDANT, GRAHAM DUFF. THIS AMOUNT IS TO BE PAID AT THE RATE OF $100 A MONTH BEGINNING 5-30-94. JUDGMENT AGAINST GRAHAM DUFF WILL BE VACATED ONCE ALL MONIES ARE PAID AND A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE SHALL BE FILED. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT MADE, THE. ENTIRE AMOUNT SHALL BE DUE AND PAYABLE FORTHWITH. AS TO JOHN DUFF, RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 20-12TH STREET, #403, SAN FRANCISCO SHALL BE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF, VINCENT KIRCHER. THE RENTAL LEASE IN THIS MATTER IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT ACTUAL PHYSICAL EVICTION SHALL NOT TAKE PLACE UNTIL 4-19-94.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUFF, GRAHAM DUFF, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20-12 STREET, ROOM 403, SAN FRANCISCO $800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, THE WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR 20-12TH STREET, ROOM 403, SAN FRANCISCO, 94103 IS AGAINST JOHN DUFF ONLY. AS TO GRAHAM DUFF, A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $800 WAS ORDERED BY THE COURT AGAINST HIM. IT IS TO BE PAID AT THE RATE OF $100 BEGINNING 5-30-94 AND ON THE 30TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID
